item.title: I think we can all agree where things are going
item.dc:creator: clemdarkstarzero

item.description: No one can touch the ultra wealthy. They do what they want. They play with us like toys. Like petulant children, they get mad at us when we break and discard us for something new. They'll use up earth then leave someday, too. Maybe not in my lifetime, but the next few generations for sure.. I think we're doomed but not in a doomer way, in a ~i was born in their toybox and have never left the playpen~ kinda way. In the way that there will be no substantial change until capitalism falls. There will be another trump, epstein, diddy, more fraud and scams until we break out of the system warping everything in favor of the sick fucks reaping what WE sow. We are forced to assimilate or struggle & die, we are forced to participate in the pollution causing mass production and consumerism, we're forced to buy their oil and invest in their stock for our retirements. We've done it all at their behest. This concludes me shouting into the void.
item.dc:creator: LazerSpacePirate

item.title: Never Again For EVERYONE

item.title: Wife sent me this. It say so much...
item.description: I mean, damn. He's not perfect in any way, has major issues like most other world leaders but still, to think he's not as bad as what we've got is... wow.
item.dc:creator: Grumpy72

item.title: Some good news for Minnesota with one tiny problem.
item.description: That tiny problem being Republican Representative Drew Roach, father of three, who is the only individual who voted no, only measure to protect children from the implementation of AI. This bill makes it illegal for any AI to be used to undress children. This one should be a no-brainer, but here we are. Remember stories like these when it comes time for midterms. Republicans overwhelmingly majority are the people who harm kids with legislation and their own personal actions.. https://thedeepdive.ca/minnesota-ai-nudification-ban-hf1606/
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: WhistlinDiesel Test Cybertruck Durability
item.description: WhistlinDiesel is a popular YouTube series starring Cody Detwiler. https://youtube.com/@whistlindiesel?si=8jL8KaixM4w5z-yl The Tesla Cybertruck is not legal to drive on public roads in the UK, in many other places. Among other things it's a matter of safety standards, including issues with sharp, angular, stainless-steel edges (failing to meet pedestrian protection rules).
item.dc:creator: UnattendedDeviant

23
24
25
27 Man Tax: Paul Brannigan
"There is no duty we so much underrate as the duty of being happy. By being happy we sow anonymous benefits upon the world." - Robert Louis Stevenson So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: Written August 23, 1971, just before Powell was appointed to the Supreme Court, it argued that business was under "broad attack" from consumer, environmental, and intellectual groups.
item.description: The 1971 Powell Memo, titled "Attack on American Free Enterprise System," was a confidential, influential document written by Lewis F. Powell Jr. to the U.S. Chamber of Commerce. It urged corporate America to aggressively defend capitalism against1960s liberal movements by influencing media, academia, courts, and politics, laying the groundwork for the modern conservative movement and corporate lobbying. https://biotech.law.lsu.edu/blog/powell-memo.pdf
item.dc:creator: thebigbaka

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1675 (urns)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
This is the first day I haven't seen a Lazuli Bunting outside for like, a week. I also ran into them on my birding jaunt near Badger Springs, where I ended up following a flock down canyon, glistening like polished lapis in the morning light. I kinda wish I was musically talented because a comfy synth album about Lazuli Bunting migration might be fun to listen to.
A reference to the divisive nature of paleoart.
I've always wanted to see a Hoopoe.
This is the Meme that will get me so much hate mail, but I love it and you're welcome.
Fuck yea
The next images are rconstructed clothing from medieval Nubia (c 1100-1300 AD) based on wall frescos.
Me, ALL THE TIME
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin? OK. [Beep]?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
